templates.title: AC Templates
templates.description: Named templates shared across accessories. Use {host} and {port} placeholders in URLs. Accessories reference a template by name and only need to supply host/port.

name.title: Template Name
name.description: Referenced by accessories using the 'template' field.

stateUrl.title: State URL
stateUrl.description: Base URL for characteristics with no own URL. Use {host}/{port} placeholders.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (s)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh state. 0 = disabled.

setterDelay.title: Setter Delay (ms)
setterDelay.description: Debounce delay for SET commands. 0 = immediate.

minTemp.title: Min Temperature
minTemp.description: Minimum target temperature in HomeKit. Default: 16°C.

maxTemp.title: Max Temperature
maxTemp.description: Maximum target temperature in HomeKit. Default: 30°C.

command.title: Composed Command
command.description: IR-blaster mode: one HTTP call with full AC state. Use {active}, {mode}, {temperature}, {fanSpeed}, {swingVertical}, {swingHorizontal} in body.

swingVertical.title: Vertical Swing
swingVertical.description: Maps to HomeKit SwingMode. Set stateless:true for IR toggle remotes.

swingHorizontal.title: Horizontal Swing
swingHorizontal.description: Linked Switch tile. Set stateless:true for IR toggle remotes.

currentRelativeHumidity.title: Humidity Sensor
currentRelativeHumidity.description: Optional humidity reading. Appears as a linked sensor tile.

accessories.title: AC Units
accessories.description: List of AC accessories. Each can use a template and only override what differs.

serial.title: Serial Number
serial.description: Used as stable HomeKit UUID seed. Recommended.

template.title: Template
template.description: Name of a platform-level template to inherit.

stateUrl.title: State URL
stateUrl.description: Base URL for characteristics that have no own URL. Used as fallback for per-characteristic GET.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (s)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh state from the device. 0 = disabled.

setterDelay.title: Setter Delay (ms)
setterDelay.description: Debounce delay for SET commands. Useful for slider controls. 0 = immediate.

minTemp.title: Min Temperature
minTemp.description: Minimum target temperature in HomeKit. Default: 16°C.

maxTemp.title: Max Temperature
maxTemp.description: Maximum target temperature in HomeKit. Default: 30°C.

command.title: Composed Command
command.description: IR-blaster / single-shot mode: one HTTP call carrying the full AC state. Use {active}, {mode}, {temperature}, {fanSpeed}, {swingVertical}, {swingHorizontal} in body.

map.title: Value Maps
map.description: Per-field mappings from HomeKit values to API strings. Keys are HomeKit values (0/1/2…), values are API strings.

swingVertical.title: Vertical Swing
swingVertical.description: Maps to HomeKit SwingMode. Set stateless:true for IR toggle-only remotes.

swingHorizontal.title: Horizontal Swing
swingHorizontal.description: Appears as a linked Switch tile. Set stateless:true for IR toggle-only remotes.

currentRelativeHumidity.title: Humidity Sensor
currentRelativeHumidity.description: Optional humidity reading. Appears as a linked sensor tile inside the AC accessory.
